de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class WellDefinednessCheck

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.WellDefinednessCheck
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Contract, SpecificationElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ClassWellDefinedness, MethodWellDefinedness, StatementWellDefinedness

    public abstract class WellDefinednessCheck
extends java.lang.Object
implements Contract
    A contract for checking the well-definedness of a jml specification element (i.e. a class invariant, a method contract, a model field or any jml statement), consisting of precondition, assignable-clause, postcondition, accessible-clause, measured-by-clause and represents-clause.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  WellDefinednessCheck.POTerms
      A data structure for storing and passing all specifications of a specification element includinf pre- and post-condition, an assignable-clause and a list of all other clauses specified.
      static class  WellDefinednessCheck.TermAndFunc
      A static data structure for passing a term with a function.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract

        Contract.OriginalVariables

      WellDefinednessCheck combine(WellDefinednessCheck wdc, TermServices services)
      Combines two well-definedness checks having the same name, id, target, type, behaviour and are either both model fields or both not a model field.

      • map

        public abstract WellDefinednessCheck map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator<Term> op,
                                         Services services)
        Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
        Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
        Specified by:
        map in interface Contract
        Specified by:
        map in interface SpecificationElement
        Parameters:
        op - the operator to apply.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this specification element with the operator applied.

      • getBehaviour

        public abstract java.lang.String getBehaviour()
        Detects the specification element's behaviour
        Returns:
        behaviour string

      • modelField

        public abstract boolean modelField()
        Detects if the specification element is a true (i.e. not an invariant) model field
        Returns:
        true for model fields

      • getAxiom

        public abstract Term getAxiom()
        Only for contracts with model_behaviour, the result is different from null.
        Returns:
        the return value of a model method (null otherwise)

      • combine

        public WellDefinednessCheck combine(WellDefinednessCheck wdc,
                                    TermServices services)
        Combines two well-definedness checks having the same name, id, target, type, behaviour and are either both model fields or both not a model field.
        Parameters:
        wdc - the well-definedness check to be combined with the current one
        services -
        Returns:
        the combined well-definedness contract

      • isOn

        public static final boolean isOn()
        This method checks, if well-definedness checks are generally turned on or off.
        Returns:
        true if on and false if off

      • getPre

        public final WellDefinednessCheck.TermAndFunc getPre(de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.WellDefinednessCheck.Condition pre,
                                                     ParsableVariable self,
                                                     ParsableVariable heap,
                                                     ImmutableList<? extends ParsableVariable> parameters,
                                                     boolean taclet,
                                                     Services services)
        Gets the full valid precondition, which holds in the element's pre-state.
        Parameters:
        pre - the precondition with the original variables
        self - the new self variable
        heap - the new heap variable
        parameters - the new parameter list
        taclet - is true if the precondition will be used in a taclet
        services -
        Returns:
        the full valid pre-condition assumed in the pre-state including the measured-by function

      • getPost

        public final Term getPost(de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.WellDefinednessCheck.Condition post,
                          ParsableVariable result,
                          TermServices services)
        Gets the full valid post-condition
        Parameters:
        post - post-condition with original variables
        result - the new result variable
        services -
        Returns:
        the full valid post-condition

      • getUpdates

        public final Term getUpdates(Term mod,
                             LocationVariable heap,
                             ProgramVariable heapAtPre,
                             Term anonHeap,
                             TermServices services)
        Gets the necessary updates applicable to the post-condition
        Parameters:
        mod - the assignable-clause
        heap - the current heap variable
        heapAtPre - the current variable for the heap of the pre-state
        anonHeap - the anonymous heap term
        services -
        Returns:
        the applicable update term including an update for old-expressions and the anonymisation update

      • id

        public final int id()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns the id number of the contract. If a contract has instances for several methods (inheritance!), all instances have the same id. The id is either non-negative or equal to INVALID_ID.
        Specified by:
        id in interface Contract

      • toBeSaved

        public final boolean toBeSaved()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Tells whether, on saving a proof where this contract is available, the contract should be saved too. (this is currently true for contracts specified directly in DL, but not for JML contracts)
        Specified by:
        toBeSaved in interface Contract
        Returns:
        see above

        Returns:
